calls.query:
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-petition-writ-of-mandamus","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-petition-writ-of-mandamus; rg --files data/cases/ca11/68252091 | sort; find . -path '*68252091*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-petition-writ-of-mandamus/event.yaml; sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/context.json; if [ -d data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/documents ]; then find data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/documents -maxdepth 2 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,220p' {} \\;; else echo 'NO_PROVISIONED_DOCUMENTS_DIRECTORY'; fi","workdir":"/home

const [a,b] = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"fedcourts query|###.*mandamus|mandamus|petition\" docs/cli.md metrics/statpack.md | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"r", docket_number:"4:22-cv-00439", court:"flnd", entry_date_filed_before:"2024-02-01", fields:["caseName","docketNumber","court_id","dateFiled","description","document_number","absolute

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help; sed -n '1,120p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca11 --limit 20 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; find data/cases -path '*/predictions/*/*/prediction.json' -type f | head -n 2 | xargs -r -n1 sh -c 'echo \"$0\"; sed -n \"1,180p\" \"$0\"'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"set -o pipefail
out='data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-petition-writ-of-mandamus/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z'
find "$out" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
for f in "$out"/*.json; do jq empty "$f"; done
UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data
git status --short
git diff -- "$out"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.outp
